description_long: This is a rust-colored, tracked combat vehicle with a compact, boxy hull and a cylindrical turret mounted on top. The vehicle features prominent metal tracks on both sides, with visible suspension and drive wheels, and a short-barreled cannon protruding from the turret. The exterior shows signs of weathering and corrosion, giving it a rugged, battle-worn appearance. The front of the vehicle is flat with a sloped glacis plate, while the sides display hatches and a painted insignia. The rear is angular and enclosed, with no visible access points. The overall design suggests a historical armored fighting vehicle, likely from the early to mid-20th century.
description: A rust-colored, tracked combat vehicle with a cylindrical turret, short cannon, and weathered metal exterior, featuring visible tracks and a painted insignia on the side.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat glacis plate, central turret, and the width of the metal tracks.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the tracks, suspension, and the short-barreled cannon on the turret.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the angular back of the hull and the symmetry of the tracks.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the painted insignia, track details, and the turret's cannon.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible cannon mounted on the turret front; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating is visible, with flat and slightly sloped panels covering the hull and turret. The plating appears thick and robust, with no modular or reactive features apparent.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid rust-red color with weathering; no camouflage pattern visible.
attribute_military_markings: White insignia painted on the right side of the hull; no other markings visible.
